framework: Vue 3 + Vite + Reka UI, Motion for Vue, and transitional Naive UI
fontStack: system-native sans serif with a platform monospace fallback
palette: custom cool system surfaces, restrained blue action color, semantic status colors
motion: short interaction transitions, inspector entry, and user-controlled reduced motion
spacing: token scale with UnoCSS Wind utility composition
preserved: existing HTTP API and transactional deployment path
introduced: Agent avatar stacks and quick distribution affordance
Reka UI distribution picker and Motion for Vue interaction primitives
